Statute Law Revision Act 2025 Section 1

STATUTE LAW REVISION ACT 20251
Signed in Tynwald: 21 October 2025
Received Royal Assent: 21 October 2025
Announced to Tynwald: 21 October 2025
AN ACT to make minor, clerical, and substantive amendments to certain
enactments.
BE IT ENACTED by the King’s Most Excellent Majesty, by and with the advice and
consent of the Council and Keys in Tynwald assembled, and by the authority of the
same, as follows:—
PART 1 – INTRODUCTORY
1 Short title
The short title of this Act is the Statute Law Revision Act 2025.
2 Commencement
(1) This Act commences on such day or days as the Council of Ministers may
by order appoint.
(2) An order under subsection (1) may include consequential, incidental,
supplementary, transitional and transitory provisions as appear
appropriate to the Council of Ministers.
PART 2 –LEGISLATION AMENDED
3 The Factories and Workshops Act 1909 amended
[Amended section 35]
4 The Isle of Man Constitution Amendment Act 1919 amended
(1) The Isle of Man Constitution Amendment Act, 1919 is amended as follows.

PART 3
LEGISLATION REPEALED
58 Legislation repealed
The following Acts are repealed in whole.
(a) The Married Woman’s Real Property Act 1908.
(b) The Married Women’s Property Act 1935.
(c) The Public Authorities Staffs (War Service) Act 1940.
(d) The Superannuation Schemes (War Service) Act 1941.
(e) The Education (Young People’s Welfare) Act 1944.
(f) Fire Escapes Act 1950.
(g) Food and Drugs Act 1963.
(h) Fees Charges Etc. Enabling Act 1972.
(i) Preferential Payments and Other Acts (Financial Adjustments) Act 1973.
(j) Road Traffic and Highways (Miscellaneous Amendments) Act 2012.
